title: Acid Manipulation
wikitext:
[[File:Hydrosulfonic-Acid-GIF-05152017.gif|thumb|center|600px|Chlorosulfonic acid eating through a tangerine in real life]]

==Summary==
The ability to '''produce and/or manipulate acids''', or potentially corrosive substances in general, such as strong bases and digestive enzymes. A user can utilize these substances to eat away at opponents, dissolving their bodies and potentially [[Durability Negation|ignoring conventional durability]] in the process.

==Users==
*[[Xenomorph]]s ([[Alien (Franchise)|Alien]])
*[[Wamuu|The]] [[Esidisi|Pillar]] [[Kars|Men]] ([[JoJo's Bizarre Adventure]])
*[[Goop]] ([[Ben 10 (Classic)|Ben 10]])
*[[Magellan]] ([[One Piece]])
*[[Boomer (Left 4 Dead)|Boomer]] ([[Left 4 Dead]])
*[[Corroder]] ([[Hero Factory]])
*[[Rust Monster]] ([[Dungeons and Dragons]])
